nasb.text: He said to me, “Son of man, now dig through the wall.” So I dug through the wall, and behold, an entrance.

esv.text: Then he said to me, “Son of man, dig in the wall.” So I dug in the wall, and behold, there was an entrance.

cnv.text: 他對我說：“人子啊，挖牆吧！”我就挖牆，不料，見有一道門。

ccb.text: 祂对我说：“人子啊，你挖这墙。”我挖开墙后，看见一道门。
